name: Steel & Starlight
description: Steel & Starlight begins  where most stories end. An ancient, unyielding evil has claimed victory, leaving the world broken in its wake.  In the spirit world the party awakens given a second chance. One that takes them through their own histories, buried truths, and the hidden powers that are circling the end.  Walk with fate or destroy it. The choice is yours.

name: Witherdeep: Forest & Flame
description: A dark, high-fantasy D&D campaign of living forests,forgotten saints, and silent gods.  Centuries ago, flame-wielding Saints tried to purge the blighted Witherdeep. They vanished. Their towers remain, half-buried in roots, still burning.   You are called to the edge of a dying forest where memory, magic, and truth are unraveling. Will you uncover the Saints’ last lie, or become another whispered name devoured by the terrors?

name: Magi Knight: Death Games
description: In this world, magic isn’t rare, it’s patented. Created. Bred. A century ago, Magi-Knights were guardians of the world. They saved the world. . . and modern capitalism found them. Now their power is licensed, branded, medicated, insured, and televised.

name: Bound by Night
description: The city is rotting from the inside out.  Vampire courts fracture under the weight of secrets, their alliances thin as glass. The Anarchs claw for freedom while the Camarilla tightens its grip, and something older stirs beneath it all.  Beyond the veil, the spirit world festers. The werewolves are losing ground. Caerns are dying. The Wyrm is not just creeping in—it’s being invited.  And in the middle of it all… romance between Garou and recently changed kindred.

name: Whispering Pantheon
description: Whispering Pantheon is a story of legacy, loss, and the fragile bond between mortals and the divine. As children of the Greek gods, you stand between two worlds, never fully belonging to either.  And now, both are in danger. The god of slaughter, Mogis, has begun the unthinkable: hunting gods themselves. As divine voices grow quiet and temples fall silent, the balance between myth and reality begins to fracture.

name: Chosen by Night
description: You are Mortal.  They are not.  Supernatural stalkers are watching you, lingering in shadows, memorizing your routines, learning your fears.  And while you try to survive their obsession. . .  A serial killer is on the loose and the ghosts of their victims keep whispering your name.  You are not the hunter. You are the hunted. Their chosen prey.

name: Strixhaven: Magic Within
description: Enroll at Strixhaven University, the multiverse’s most elite magical institution, where you'll balance cutthroat academics, campus shenanigans, and budding romances with an ominous, hidden plot threatening the school.

name: Star Path
description: In this world, great powers are moving , ancient forces once thought dormant are active again and whatever is coming needs an unlikely band of heroes chosen by the stars to stop it.

name: Salem by Night
description: Salem by Night weaves dark magic, ancient bloodlines, and modern paranoia into a chilling chronicle set in New York’s endless night. The Second Inquisition rises again—not as scattered hunters, but as a unified force led by a figure steeped in myth and shadow.  Rumors whisper that this leader has found a way to end vampirism entirely… not just destroy the Kindred, but erase them.  As secrets claw their way to the surface, your coterie stands at the center of it all—bound by fate, blood, or something far worse.
